task_statement: P6 of BRICK 6-surface audit repair: verification surface honesty. Remove/correct misleading pytest surface, fix stale profile-count docs, add checker/pin against false-green verification declarations, and prove focused profile and check_profile.py --all agree through official brick build graph route.
selection_rule: manual graph because P6 is a verification/product-doc/checker boundary repair that must preserve support evidence limits and cannot be reduced to a preset.

nodes.work_statement:
Design P6 verification-surface honesty repair from the P6 phase doc and audit refs. Derive exact implementation scope for misleading pytest/test surface, stale profile-count docs, false-green negative probe, focused-vs---all agreement, and not_proven/proof-limit reporting. Return design only.

STRICT SCOPE: phase:P6 verification-surface honesty only. Do not broaden into P7 product-route/Easy Building, P8 ship safety, P9 dynamic proof, provider reliability, release/dashboard hardening, or fresh-machine proof. Do not push. Do not use ai-cli MCP, ai-cli-backed helpers, or native subagents. Keep public/operator language build()/brick build only. Movement vocabulary is forward/reroute; HOLD/pause is lifecycle. QA lanes may inspect and run probe_write fixtures only; no QA source mutation. Checker/profile green is support evidence only.

Implement P6 verification-surface honesty. Required outcomes: (1) pyproject no longer declares pytest as if support/checkers were a pytest suite unless a real pytest wrapper exists; preferred repair is to remove the misleading tool.pytest.ini_options/testpaths support/checkers declaration and document that BRICK verification is brick verify / check_profile.py. (2) Add a checker-first negative probe/pin so the misleading pytest declaration cannot silently return: likely brick_cli_entrypoint profile text_absent and/or kernel check observation. (3) Fix stale profile-count docs: setup.md and checker-profile-map.md must not hard-pin 24/28; use measurement command and current measured observation if useful. (4) Run focused profile(s), py_compile changed Python, git diff --check, and check_profile.py --all. Return changed_files, command rc outcomes, and not_proven.

STRICT SCOPE: phase:P6 verification-surface honesty only. Do not broaden into P7 product-route/Easy Building, P8 ship safety, P9 dynamic proof, provider reliability, release/dashboard hardening, or fresh-machine proof. Do not push. Do not use ai-cli MCP, ai-cli-backed helpers, or native subagents. Keep public/operator language build()/brick build only. Movement vocabulary is forward/reroute; HOLD/pause is lifecycle. QA lanes may inspect and run probe_write fixtures only; no QA source mutation. Checker/profile green is support evidence only.

Code attack QA for P6. Verify pyproject no longer advertises support/checkers as a pytest suite, the negative probe catches reintroduction of tool.pytest.ini_options/testpaths support/checkers, docs do not contain stale fixed 24/28 profile claims as active truth, focused profile and --all agree, and changed files are inside P6 scope. Probe_write only. Return local concern targeting work if implementation_gap remains.

Axis QA for P6. Verify Brick owns checker/profile work contracts, Agent only returns support evidence, Link Movement is not inferred from checker green, and support checker/docs do not become source truth/success/quality/Movement authority. Check that pytest/test surface honesty is framed as support verification, not product success. Probe_write only.

Probe_write only.

Final P6 closure. Fan in work and QA bodies. Report observed_evidence / narrowly_proven / not_proven / remaining_delta / parent_goal_delta_status / next_target_candidates. P6 done condition: false pytest/checker surface removed or honestly wired; negative probe/pin prevents reintroduction; focused profile and check_profile.py --all agree; stale profile-count docs fixed or explicitly not_proven. If implementation/boundary/evidence gap remains, return Link-facing transition_concern_evidence targeting work. Do not claim whole goal/customer-ready complete.

P6 closure does not prove P7-P9 or customer-ready whole goal
